name: Shotdogs
author: Poki
description: Do you hate waking up on the beach to a seagull in your face and want to just throw something at it? In Shotdogs, the first thing that comes to hand is your gun and in throwing it, you realise how much fun it is! Now, utilise the help of other seagulls, bouncy slimes, hot air balloons and much much more to really launch your gun to the next stages! Upgrade your throw strength, the recoil on your gun as well as the amount of bullets you get to use from the friendly upgrade-dog vendor. Can you get to all 10 islands through the power of clicking? How to play Shotdogs? Click the left mouse button at the perfect time to launch your gun to the stars! Who created Shotdogs? Shotdogs is created by Alex Johansson. Play their other game on Poki: 100% Golf ! How can I play Shotdogs for free? You can play Shotdogs for free on Poki. Can I play Shotdogs on mobile devices and desktop? Shotdogs can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
